course corn smut it may sound like a
particularly odd genre of erotica but
corn smut is one of the many names for
huitlacoche along with Mexican truffle
and Devil's corns huitlacoche is both
the plate disease and a delicacy that
has been revered through ancient Aztec
times the fungal infection looks like
fluffy gray clouds and gives corny
unique mushroom like flavor to this day
in modern Mexico a corn cob with
blue-black spores is worth more than a
non-infected ear too many chefs Mexican
chefs fold huitlacoche into a wide range
of classic dishes from enchiladas to
keep the Dia's to flan you can purchase
your own huitlacoche on Amazon by the
jar so it's easy to whip together your
own fungal infection based delicacies at
home kangaroo loin the Australian

soured fish is a pungent smelling
traditional dish from northern Sweden it
consists of tiny herring fish caught in
the Baltic Sea then salted fermented and
cans the smell is intense described as a
combination of rotten eggs rancid butter
and vinegar as comedian Chris Gethard
learned in a 20-17 stunt the delicacy is
served in Sweden at the end of the
summer generally in outdoor locations to
allow the overwhelming odor to dissipate
some Swedes are known to bury cans in
the snow to open on December 25th like
the Fallas smelling Christmas present
ever but you don't have to go digging
